Supervisor - Class in com.unimib.assignment3.POJO
Represents a Supervisor, which is a specialized type of Employee capable of supervising other employees and managing teams.
Supervisor() - Constructor for class com.unimib.assignment3.POJO.Supervisor
Protected no-argument constructor required by JPA.
Supervisor(String, String) - Constructor for class com.unimib.assignment3.POJO.Supervisor
Creates a Supervisor with default role EmployeeRole.SW_ARCHITECT.
Supervisor(String, String, double, EmployeeRole) - Constructor for class com.unimib.assignment3.POJO.Supervisor
Creates a Supervisor with specified salary.
Supervisor(String, String, double, EmployeeRole, Supervisor, List<Supervisor>) - Constructor for class com.unimib.assignment3.POJO.Supervisor
Creates a Supervisor with full details including salary, hierarchy, and supervised teams.
Supervisor(String, String, EmployeeRole) - Constructor for class com.unimib.assignment3.POJO.Supervisor
Creates a Supervisor with a specified role.
Supervisor(String, String, EmployeeRole, Supervisor, List<Supervisor>) - Constructor for class com.unimib.assignment3.POJO.Supervisor
Creates a Supervisor with full details including hierarchy and supervised teams.
